units.subject: English
subtopics: Case-based factual passage with visual input of 200-250 words (10 marks)

units.subject: English
subtopics: Reported speech (Commands and requests, Statements, Questions)

competencies.title: Reading Comprehension
outcomes: Assess comprehension, interpretation, analysis, inference, evaluation and vocabulary through unseen passages.

competencies.title: Grammar Proficiency
outcomes: Cement high professional grasp of grammatical items including Determiners, Tenses, Modals, Subject-verb concord, and Reported speech.

competencies.title: Writing Skills
outcomes: Write descriptive paragraphs based on visual or verbal cues.

competencies.title: Creative Writing
outcomes: Write stories or diary entries based on given cues or titles.
